blocker.reason: Cannot connect to Electron app via CDP for user testing
blocker.details: Electron app is running (multiple processes observed with PIDs 36968, 37008, 37016, 35752) and port 9222 shows as LISTENING, but CDP connections timeout. Agent-browser connect times out, curl to CDP endpoint times out.
blocker.errorObserved: All CDP connection attempts timeout or fail

codeInspection.finding: The Batal button fix appears to be correctly implemented in all form pages. Each Batal button calls resetForm() and onCancel() in sequence.
